description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box constructed from dark-stained wooden slats, with visible wood grain and some natural imperfections such as knots and scratches. The box features open slats on all four sides and the bottom, allowing for airflow and visibility of contents. The corners are reinforced with thicker wooden posts, fastened together with visible metal nails or screws. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, making it suitable for holding various items. The overall finish is rustic and utilitarian, with a matte, slightly rough surface texture. There are no handles, lids, or labeling areas present on the box.
description: A rustic, open wooden storage box made of dark-stained slats with reinforced corners and a matte, rough finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing three horizontal wooden slats with visible wood grain and reinforced corners.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow end with two horizontal slats and thick corner posts.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with three horizontal slats and visible fasteners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other end with two horizontal slats and sturdy posts.
